description: QuantAI error catalog. Each entry classifies a known error pattern, links to a runbook, and optionally specifies an auto-fix action. Patterns are case-insensitive substrings unless the entry sets is_regex=true. Categories: recurring (seen 3+ times), novel (seen once), transient (self-heals). Auto-actions: retry, restart_service, skip, none.

errors.pattern: qty must be > 0
errors.description: Alpaca mleg order rejected — top-level qty field missing from payload.

errors.pattern: invalid position_intent
errors.description: Alpaca mleg order rejected — position_intent field present on legs. Alpaca does not accept this field.

errors.pattern: Chain query 404
errors.description: Options chain endpoint returned 404 for a ticker. Falls back to proposed strikes but skips validation.

errors.pattern: TimeoutExpired
errors.description: Subprocess timeout on scan_options.py. 78 tickers × 4 scan types takes 10-15 min; previously capped at 300s.

errors.pattern: pipeline beat=(stale|missing).*market=True
errors.description: Heartbeat monitor detected pipeline.beat older than 20m DURING market hours. Pipeline may have stopped firing — actionable.

errors.pattern: 'NoneType' object is not subscriptable
errors.description: yfinance returned None for a ticker during market_intelligence.py run. Transient network issue — self-heals next cycle.

errors.pattern: VIX: 0.0
errors.description: Market intelligence failed to fetch VIX. Debate chamber and guards make decisions on stale/garbage data if this persists.

errors.pattern: F&G scrape failed (HTTP Error 418
errors.description: CNN Fear & Greed endpoint returns HTTP 418 (bot detection). Code falls back to VIX-based proxy. Works but less accurate.

errors.pattern: ConnectionError
errors.description: Network connection failure to Alpaca API. Can affect order placement, position fetch, chain lookup.

errors.pattern: SPY curl timeout
errors.description: SPY quote fetch timeout during market_intelligence.py run. Transient.

errors.pattern: below credit floor
errors.description: Guard rejected trade because estimated_credit fell below minimum. Expected for debit strategies; bypass flag now exists for diagonals.

errors.pattern: Debate failed — skipping execution
errors.description: Debate chamber subprocess returned non-zero. Most common cause: Anthropic API error (credits, rate limit, key invalid).

errors.pattern: credit balance is too low
errors.description: Anthropic API rejected debate request — account has zero credits. Pipeline cannot enter trades until credits are added.

errors.pattern: 'NoneType' object has no attribute 'replace'
errors.description: Journal entry has null strategy field (e.g. P001 SOFI). Callers must use `(t.get('strategy') or '?')` pattern.

errors.pattern: Close order FAILED N: mleg orders must have at least N legs and at most N legs
errors.description: Close order rejected by IBKR: combo leg count out of range (1–4). Closing legs may have expired or position partially filled.

errors.pattern: Close order failed for A008 — trade stays OPEN, will retry next cycle
errors.description: Close order failed for A008 — journal entry stays OPEN until next retry.

errors.pattern: Close order failed for A010 — trade stays OPEN, will retry next cycle
errors.description: Close order failed for A010 — journal entry stays OPEN until next retry.

errors.pattern: Close order failed for A009 — trade stays OPEN, will retry next cycle
errors.description: Close order failed for A009 — journal entry stays OPEN until next retry.

errors.pattern: Traceback (most recent call last):
errors.description: Traceback in pipeline — unhandled exception. Needs investigation.

errors.pattern: ❌ Leg failed — rolling back
errors.description: Option leg order was placed but subsequent leg failed; position partially rolled back.

errors.pattern: [market_intelligence] Finnhub events failed: HTTP Error N: Forbidden
errors.description: Finnhub economic events API failed with HTTP 403 (rate-limit or auth). Non-critical — pipeline continues without events data.

errors.pattern: ❌ Order failed: asset 'S' not found
errors.description: IBKR rejected order: asset symbol not found. OCC symbol may be stale or contract expired.

errors.pattern: ❌ Order failed: account not eligible to trade uncovered option contracts
errors.description: IBKR rejected order: account not eligible to trade uncovered options. Multi-leg order submitted without valid pair.

errors.pattern: ❌ REJECTED: Credit $-N < $N
errors.description: Strategy credit-floor guard triggered — proposed credit below minimum threshold. Trade skipped (expected behavior).

errors.pattern: result = subprocess.run(cmd, timeout=N)
errors.description: Subprocess scan timed out (stack frame). Usually scan_options.py hitting TimeoutExpired.

errors.pattern: stdout, stderr = process.communicate(input, timeout=timeout)
errors.description: Subprocess communicate() timeout (stack frame). See scan-timeout entry.

errors.pattern: stdout, stderr = self._communicate(input, endtime, timeout)
errors.description: Subprocess _communicate timeout (stack frame). See scan-timeout entry.

errors.pattern: self.wait(timeout=self._remaining_time(endtime))
errors.description: Subprocess wait() timeout (stack frame). See scan-timeout entry.

errors.pattern: return self._wait(timeout=timeout)
errors.description: Subprocess _wait() timeout (stack frame). See scan-timeout entry.
JSON payload fragment in pipeline log output (not an error). Noise from debug logging.

errors.pattern: ❌ REJECTED: Already N open positions
errors.description: Position count guard: already at max open positions. Trade skipped (expected risk behavior).

errors.pattern: ❌ Leg failed — skipping this trade
errors.description: Options leg skipped — qualifyContracts failed or chain empty. Trade aborted cleanly.

errors.pattern: pipeline beat=(stale|missing).*market=False
errors.description: Pipeline beat is stale because market is closed. Expected — not an incident.

errors.pattern: (Invalid user|Connection (closed|reset) by invalid user|Disconnected from invalid user)
errors.description: Internet scanners probing SSH with invalid usernames. fail2ban handles the actual ban; this is just noise from the attempt itself.

errors.pattern: \[UFW BLOCK\]
errors.description: UFW firewall rejecting an inbound packet. Routine — firewall doing its job.
Routine LLM judge output from debate_chamber.py — not an error.

errors.pattern: ^(\[\d[\d:]*\s*ET?\]\s*)?(Thesis|Invalidation):
errors.description: Routine trade-proposal output (thesis / invalidation rules) — not an error.

errors.pattern: ^(\[\d[\d:]*\s*ET?\]\s*)?(SELL|BUY)\s+(PUT|CALL)\s
errors.description: Routine trade-leg output from autonomous_execution.py — not an error.

errors.pattern: TEST_DEDUP error: canary_marker_for_dedup_check
errors.description: Test canary line written during 2026-04-26 verification. Safe to ignore.

errors.pattern: in IB Gateway restart window
errors.description: _is_in_restart_window guard correctly refusing to connect during 23:30-00:15 ET nightly IB Gateway restart. Expected behavior; no action needed.

errors.pattern: client id is already in use
errors.description: Stale ib_insync connection holding a clientId across the gateway restart. Self-resolves once the orphaned peer disconnects (usually within ~1h post-restart). Trace clientId=41 owner separately.

errors.pattern: API connection failed: TimeoutError
errors.description: IB Gateway slow to accept connections post-restart. Auto-retries by the 3-attempt wrapper. Becomes actionable only if it persists past 01:30 ET.

errors.pattern: Error 1100, reqId -1: Connectivity between IBKR and Trader Workstation has been lost
errors.description: IB Gateway socket-level disconnect, typically during nightly restart (23:45 ET) or transient network blip. Always paired with an Error 1102 (restored) once back. No action required unless persists past the restart window.

errors.pattern: positions request timed out
errors.description: ib_insync positions() call did not return within timeout — usually because the API connection was severed mid-call by the nightly gateway restart. Resolves on next collector cycle.

errors.pattern: elevated is not available right now (runtime=direct)
errors.description: OpenClaw tool harness blocked an elevated-mode tool call because the runtime is direct. Self-corrects on next dispatch. Non-trading.

errors.pattern: exec denied: allowlist miss
errors.description: OpenClaw tool sandbox refused a command that's not on the allowlist. Expected security gate; non-trading.

errors.pattern: IBKRBroker: gave up after 3 connect attempts to 127.0.0.1:4002
errors.description: IB Gateway port 4002 not accepting connections. Process alive but logged out. Most common cause: IBC hit IBKR login rate-limit after maintenance disconnect. Manual restart required.

errors.pattern: fail2ban.filter
errors.description: fail2ban detected an SSH login attempt. fail2ban is handling it (ban will follow). Pure audit noise — no action needed.

errors.pattern: health-monitor: restarting (reason: stale-socket)
errors.description: OpenClaw health-monitor detected a stale Discord WebSocket and restarted the connection. Expected behavior during Discord API hiccups; escalate only if it repeats >10x/hour.

errors.pattern: Error 321, reqId
errors.description: IBKR TWS API error 321: group name cannot be null. Usually triggered by a portfolio group request during session setup. Benign — does not affect order placement.

errors.pattern: account updates request timed out
errors.description: IBKR account updates subscription timed out. Usually a transient blip during gateway startup or after reconnect. If persistent, check gateway logs.

errors.pattern: graphify --update failed
errors.description: Post-commit graphify knowledge-graph refresh failed. Code changes are live but the graph is stale until the next successful update. Non-critical for trading.

errors.pattern: Invalid user .+ from
errors.description: SSH login attempt with an invalid username. Standard internet background noise; fail2ban is managing bans. No action needed unless ban count exceeds 100/hour.

errors.pattern: (Disconnected|Connection closed|Connection reset) (from|by) invalid user
errors.description: SSH connection closed by invalid user after rejected login. Normal fail2ban lifecycle. Info-only.

errors.pattern: Disconnected from authenticating user root
errors.description: SSH login attempt using the root account — rejected (PermitRootLogin no). Background scanner noise; fail2ban handles it.

errors.pattern: IBKRBroker connect attempt
errors.description: Individual IBKR connection attempt failed (one of N retries). Only actionable if all retries exhausted (see ibkr-port-refused).

errors.pattern: completed orders request timed out
errors.description: IBKR completed orders query timed out during order status polling. Usually transient after reconnect. Circuit breaker in collect_alpaca.py limits retry storms.

errors.pattern: API connection failed: ConnectionRefusedError
errors.description: ib_insync low-level connection refused on a single retry. Part of the 3-attempt sequence in IBKRBroker.connect(). If all 3 fail, ibkr-port-refused fires.

errors.pattern: Make sure API port on TWS/IBG is open
errors.description: ib_insync hint message printed when connection is refused. Paired with ibkr-api-connection-refused. Downgraded to warning — actionable only via ibkr-port-refused runbook.

errors.pattern: pipeline beat=stale age=
errors.description: Pipeline heartbeat is stale but market is closed — expected during overnight/weekend gap. Heartbeat monitor already handles the ok-overnight demotion.

errors.pattern: No security definition has been found for the request
errors.description: Agent attempted to qualify an option contract that doesn't exist on IBKR (delisted, wrong expiry, wrong strike, etc.). Agent skips that candidate and continues — no action required. Fires on routine scanner mismatches.

errors.pattern: IBKRBroker: failed to qualify leg
errors.description: Leg qualification failed during contract resolution (typically pairs with 'No security definition' when the underlying option doesn't exist). Agent skips this leg and the candidate trade — routine, not blocking.
